result:
I’d make **high-quality education universally accessible**—free, practical, and lifelong.

If everyone had real access to learning (not just school, but critical thinking, emotional skills, financial literacy, health knowledge, and digital literacy), it would ripple into almost every major issue: poverty, misinformation, inequality, conflict, and even climate action.

If I had to pick just one lever, that would be it.

content.text:
I’d make **high-quality education universally accessible**—free, practical, and lifelong.

If everyone had real access to learning (not just school, but critical thinking, emotional skills, financial literacy, health knowledge, and digital literacy), it would ripple into almost every major issue: poverty, misinformation, inequality, conflict, and even climate action.

If I had to pick just one lever, that would be it.

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
